section_title: 7.1 The Aksumite State and Its World (c. 100 BC – 300 AD)
change_summary: Revised several long sentences to improve readability.
Converted passive voice constructions to active voice (e.g., 'was reflected in' to 'shaped').
Shortened the introductory learner overview sentences.
notes: Initial audit score was a pass, but revisions were made to improve clarity and style based on tool feedback.
